context: Tests whether the agent fully removes ESLint and Prettier from the toolchain (not just adds Biome alongside them), updates CI scripts to use Biome's --error-on-warnings, and produces a properly configured biome.json that replaces both tools.

checklist.name: ESLint removed from scripts
checklist.description: package.json scripts no longer contain eslint commands — Biome commands replace them

checklist.name: Prettier removed from scripts
checklist.description: package.json scripts no longer contain prettier commands — Biome commands replace them

checklist.name: Biome scripts added
checklist.description: package.json includes biome check and biome check --write (or equivalent) as lint and format scripts

checklist.name: CI script uses --error-on-warnings
checklist.description: The CI-targeted script in package.json uses bunx @biomejs/biome check . --error-on-warnings

checklist.name: ESLint/Prettier devDeps removed
checklist.description: devDependencies in package.json no longer include eslint, prettier, or their associated plugins

checklist.name: biome.json linter configured
checklist.description: biome.json has a linter section with at least one explicit rule enabled (not empty default)

checklist.name: MIGRATION.md notes removal
checklist.description: MIGRATION.md explicitly states that ESLint and Prettier have been removed and replaced with Biome
